issues.description: DSL uses single action array, but card text specifies 'Choose one:' with two mutually exclusive options. Should be two separate effect objects with a choice mechanism, or actions should be wrapped in a choice structure. Current DSL implies both Rest AND KO happen, violating the 'one or the other' logic.

First action (Rest) targets 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text specifies 'rest up to 1 of your opponent's DON!! cards' — should target DON cards specifically, not generic characters. Scope/filter is incorrect.
Second action (KO) targets 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text specifies 'rested Characters' only. Target must include rested state condition.
